nodes.title: 2000PX ID + FACEFIX - DESCRIPTION
widgets_values:
2000PX ID + FACEFIX Workflow:
This workflow clones one face, uses one pose, and adopts the style from an image for the cloning process.
YOU CAN DISABLE THE STYLE NODE AND WRITE A PROMT TO CONTROL THE OUTPUT. >>>>>>
